The '''Battle of Yag'Dhul''' occurred prior to the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invasion of Coruscant]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Prelude==
[[Nom Anor]], disguised as a [[Givin/Legends|Givin]], attempted to sabotage the [[Yag'Dhul system/Legends|Yag'Dhul system's]] defenses in preparation for the attack.

==The battle==
[[File:Solo_Veila_First_Kiss.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Anakin Solo and Tahiri Veila share their first kiss as the battle rages.]]
A [[Yuuzhan Vong]] force assaulted the planet in the hopes of using it as a staging area to attack the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]], but an effort by [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] thwarted Nom Anor's plans. The Givin fleet defended Yag'Dhul, but was outnumbered by approximately two to one. However, Yuuzhan Vong forces were withdrawn due to the [[Second Battle of Sernpidal]], saving Yag'Dhul.

==Behind the scenes==
Although the book only mentions Givin-designed ships taking part in the battle, and that [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces would be fifteen hours away, ''The New Jedi Order Sourcebook'' shows a large amount of non-Givin ships in the battle, coming out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
